code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut total = 0
mut current = 0
mut has_digit = false
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)
mut done = false

while i < n and not done
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    -1
  end
  if b >= 48 and b <= 57
    current = current * 10 + (b - 48)
    has_digit = true
  else
    if has_digit
      if total + current > 100
        done = true
      else
        total = total + current
        current = 0
        has_digit = false
      end
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if has_digit and not done
  if total + current <= 100
    total = total + current
  end
end

print("total=#{total}")
